summary: Spending consistency fix verified successfully. Dashboard 'THIS MONTH' (€168,580.99) now matches Spending Insights 'This Month' (€168,580.99). Last 30 days correctly shows different amount (€174,080.99). All flows working correctly.

Both endpoints return identical total (16858099 cents = €168,580.99) for calendar month calculation

context_for_next_testing_agent: Spending consistency fix verified.
